mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ORG_DEPARTMENT_MNECODE (ID, ROW_VERSION, LANGUAGE, MNE_CODE, DEPT_ID, DEPT_NAME, CREATOR, MODIFIER, CREATE_STAFF_ID, MODIFY_STAFF_ID) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.rowVersion}, #{item.language}, #{item.mneCode}, #{item.deptId}, #{item.deptName}, #{item.creator}, #{item.modifier}, #{item.createStaffId}, #{item.modifyStaffId} )
